backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the job board backend with data types and CRUD operations for candidates, employers, job postings, user profiles, and job applications, with access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (employer nav changes, Apply Now button, applications tab, salary formatting) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes like INR formatting, apply-to-job hooks, and deprecated class replacements.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, candidate/employer dashboards, job listings, PharmSearch) wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: HOC that gates child content behind Internet Identity authentication, showing a loading spinner or login prompt when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/CandidateCard.ts: Clickable card component displaying a candidate's avatar, name, specialization, qualification, location, experience, expected salary (formatted with formatINR), and a skills preview.
frontend/src/components/CandidateDetailM: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a candidate, including contact details, professional info, skills, bio, and resume link.
frontend/src/components/CandidateProfile: A form component that allows an existing candidate to edit and save their profile details, using the updateCandidateProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/CandidateRegistr: A registration form for new candidates to create their pharmacy job profile, with validation and the registerCandidate mutation.
frontend/src/components/EmployerRegistra: A registration form for employers to create a company profile, with field validation and the registerEmployer mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer component displaying the Wakeup brand, navigation links for candidates and employers, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation, role-aware links (candidate vs. employer), and login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailModal.t: Modal dialog displaying full details of a job posting, including employer info, job metadata, and an apply button for authenticated candidates.
frontend/src/components/JobListingCard.t: Card component that renders a summary of a job posting with employer name, location, experience, salary, and badges for specializations and qualifications.
frontend/src/components/JobListingsFilte: Sidebar filter panel for the public job listings page, supporting filtering by specialization, location, and experience range with a clear/reset option.
frontend/src/components/JobPostingForm.t: Form component for creating or editing a job posting, with fields for title, specializations, qualifications, experience, location, salary, description, and skills.
Displays an employer's job postings as cards with toggle-active controls, edit navigation, and a collapsible section showing applicant candidates per job.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/PharmSearchFilte: Sidebar filter panel for the pharmacist search page, supporting filtering by keywords, specialization, qualification, experience range, and location.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name and role (candidate or employer) on first login, then saves the profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/ResumeUploadSect: A card component that allows a candidate to upload or replace their resume (PDF/DOC/DOCX, max 10MB), showing upload progress and current resume status.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity state persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, candidates, employers, job postings, and resume uploads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines the Wakeup brand design tokens (deep teal + warm coral) for both light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/CandidateDashboardPag: Displays the authenticated candidate's dashboard with profile summary, active/inactive toggle, and tabbed sections for profile editing and resume upload. Shows a prompt to create a profile if none exists.
frontend/src/pages/CandidateRegistration: Renders the candidate registration page with a form to create a new pharmacist profile, redirecting to the dashboard if a profile already exists.
frontend/src/pages/EmployerDashboardPage: Displays the authenticated employer's dashboard with company summary and tabbed sections for job postings and candidate search, prompting profile creation if none exists.
frontend/src/pages/EmployerRegistrationP: Renders the employer registration page with a form to create a company profile, redirecting to the employer dashboard if a profile already exists.
frontend/src/pages/JobPostingFormPage.ts: Provides a create or edit form page for job postings, loading existing job data when in edit mode and requiring an employer profile to proceed.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section, specialization stats, and benefit cards for both candidates and employers with navigation CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/PharmSearchPage.tsx: Employer-facing candidate search page with filter controls and a results grid of pharmacist profiles, supporting keyword and attribute-based filtering with a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/PublicJobListingsPage: Public-facing page that displays all active pharmacy job postings with filtering by specialization, location, and experience range, plus a detail modal on job selection.
frontend/src/utils/formatINR.ts: Utility function that formats a number into Indian Rupee string notation with proper Indian grouping (e.g., 250000 → ₹2,50,000).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), an extended oklch-based color palette (teal, coral, sidebar, chart), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing Wakeup, a pharmacy-focused job portal with dual employer/candidate login, ICP backend, and tracking of existing features, known issues, and architectural notes.
